coreResponsibility.summary: PlayKit JS Bumper is a plugin for the Kaltura Player that enables displaying short video clips (bumpers) before and/or after the main content playback, commonly used for channel identification, sponsorship messages, or promotional content.

featureOwnership: Pre-roll bumper playback (video clip before main content)
Post-roll bumper playback (video clip after main content)
Bumper video element management (separate from main video)
Click-through URL handling for bumper ads
Bumper state machine management (IDLE, LOADING, LOADED, PLAYING, PAUSED, DONE)
Playback middleware integration for bumper sequencing
Ads controller integration for bumper-as-ad behavior
Engine decorator for playback state during bumper
Metadata-based bumper configuration from Kaltura backend
Support for main video tag playback (iOS/TV compatibility)
dataHandling: Bumper state machine (BumperState: IDLE, LOADING, LOADED, PLAYING, PAUSED, DONE)
Content playback state preservation (currentTime, duration, audio/text tracks)
Kaltura metadata parsing for bumper URL and position
Ad break and ad event management

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Core Kaltura Player providing BasePlugin, middleware, and event system

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js
upstream.description: Core PlayKit library providing video element abstractions

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js-providers
upstream.description: OVP provider for metadata API requests

upstream.name: Kaltura Backend Metadata API
upstream.description: metadata_metadata.list API for fetching bumper configuration from entry metadata

downstream.name: Kaltura Player UI
downstream.description: UI layer that responds to bumper ad events (AD_BREAK_START, AD_BREAK_END)

downstream.name: Application layer
downstream.description: Host applications that configure and consume bumper functionality

externalApis.name: Kaltura Metadata API
externalApis.description: Retrieves bumper configuration (BumperUrl, BumperPosition, BumperClickThroughUrl) from entry metadata

entryPoints.description: Plugin registration entry point - registers 'bumper' plugin with Kaltura Player
Main plugin class (Bumper) - implements IMiddlewareProvider, IAdsControllerProvider, IEngineDecoratorProvider
Playback middleware - intercepts play/pause/load for bumper sequencing
Ads controller implementation - handles bumper-as-ad behavior
Engine decorator - manages playback state during bumper playback
State constants - LOADING, LOADED, PLAYING, PAUSED, IDLE, DONE
Kaltura metadata API loader for fetching bumper config from backend

configurationOptions.id: Container div ID for the bumper
configurationOptions.clickThroughUrl: URL opened when clicking on bumper
configurationOptions.position: Array specifying when to show bumper: [0] = preroll, [-1] = postroll, [0, -1] = both
configurationOptions.disableMediaPreload: Disable main content preload during bumper
configurationOptions.playOnMainVideoTag: Play bumper on main video element (for TV/iOS)
configurationOptions.useConfigFromMetadata: Fetch bumper config from Kaltura entry metadata
configurationOptions.metadataProfileId: Metadata profile ID for fetching bumper config
